languages.text: Eogunn applies {g|f:4644d27aca624059883392696c49456d}Electrical{/g} for 1 round to himself or an ally in a range equal to {uip|AbilityRange|bbd46bb4c64e4d6aa6783fd1fb6bc819} cells, strengthening their strikes with electricity. Requires 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potential Energy{/g}, which are spent upon use.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn applies {g|f:4644d27aca624059883392696c49456d}Electrical{/g} for 1 round to himself or an ally in a range equal to {uip|AbilityRange|bbd46bb4c64e4d6aa6783fd1fb6bc819} cells, strengthening their strikes with electricity. Requires 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potential Energy{/g}, which are spent upon use.

languages.text: Eogunn grants {g|f:4644d27aca624059883392696c49456d}electrified strikes{/g} to himself or an ally within {uip|AbilityRange|bbd46bb4c64e4d6aa6783fd1fb6bc819} cells for 1 round, allowing the target to deal additional shock damage. To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which are removed afterwards.
languages.original_text: Eogunn applies {g|f:4644d27aca624059883392696c49456d}Electrical{/g} for 1 round to himself or an ally in a range equal to {uip|AbilityRange|bbd46bb4c64e4d6aa6783fd1fb6bc819} cells, strengthening their strikes with electricity. Requires 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potential Energy{/g}, which are spent upon use.

traits.locale_text:
All weapons equipped by Eogunn or an ally within a {uip|AbilityRange|bbd46bb4c64e4d6aa6783fd1fb6bc819}-cell radius become {g|f:4644d27aca624059883392696c49456d}electrified{/g} for 1 round.
Eogunn's resolve is reduced by −100% for 1 round. Half of all {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} stacks on him are removed.

Eogunn grants {g|f:4644d27aca624059883392696c49456d}electrified strikes{/g} to himself or an ally within {uip|AbilityRange|bbd46bb4c64e4d6aa6783fd1fb6bc819} cells for 1 round, allowing the target to deal additional shock damage. To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which are removed afterwards.

Eogunn grants {g|f:4644d27aca624059883392696c49456d}electrified strikes{/g} to himself or an ally within {uip|AbilityRange|bbd46bb4c64e4d6aa6783fd1fb6bc819} cells for 1 round, allowing the target to deal additional shock damage. To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which are removed afterwards.

All weapons equipped by Eogunn or an ally within a {uip|AbilityRange|bbd46bb4c64e4d6aa6783fd1fb6bc819}-cell radius become {g|f:4644d27aca624059883392696c49456d}electrified{/g} for 1 round.
Eogunn's resolve is reduced by −100% for 1 round. Half of all his {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} stacks are removed.

languages.text: Эоганн накладывает на себя или союзника в радиусе {uip|AbilityRange|bbd46bb4c64e4d6aa6783fd1fb6bc819} клеток эффект {g|f:4644d27aca624059883392696c49456d}заряженные атаки{/g} на 1 раунд, позволяя цели наносить дополнительный электрический урон. Для использования этой способности у Эоганна должно быть не менее 2 уровней {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}потенциальной энергии{/g}. Они снимаются после использования.
languages.original_text: Eogunn grants {g|f:4644d27aca624059883392696c49456d}electrified strikes{/g} to himself or an ally within {uip|AbilityRange|bbd46bb4c64e4d6aa6783fd1fb6bc819} cells for 1 round, allowing the target to deal additional shock damage. To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which are removed afterwards.

traits.locale_text: Эоганн накладывает на себя или союзника в радиусе {uip|AbilityRange|bbd46bb4c64e4d6aa6783fd1fb6bc819} клеток эффект {g|f:4644d27aca624059883392696c49456d}заряженные атаки{/g} на 1 раунд, позволяя цели наносить дополнительный электрический урон. Для использования этой способности у Эоганна должно быть не менее 2 уровней {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}потенциальной энергии{/g}{/g}. Они снимаются после использования.

Эоганн накладывает на себя или союзника в радиусе {uip|AbilityRange|bbd46bb4c64e4d6aa6783fd1fb6bc819} клеток эффект {g|f:4644d27aca624059883392696c49456d}заряженные атаки{/g} на 1 раунд, позволяя цели наносить дополнительный электрический урон. Для использования этой способности у Эоганна должно быть не менее 2 уровней {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}потенциальной энергии{/g}{/g}. Они снимаются после использования.

languages.text: Eogunn otorga {g|f:4644d27aca624059883392696c49456d}golpes electrizados{/g} a sí mismo o a un aliado en un radio de {uip|AbilityRange|bbd46bb4c64e4d6aa6783fd1fb6bc819} casillas durante 1 asalto, lo que permite al objetivo realizar daño de conmoción adicional. Para usar esta capacidad, Eogunn debe tener al menos 2 acumulaciones de {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}energía potencial{/g}, que se eliminan tras su uso.
languages.original_text: Eogunn grants {g|f:4644d27aca624059883392696c49456d}electrified strikes{/g} to himself or an ally within {uip|AbilityRange|bbd46bb4c64e4d6aa6783fd1fb6bc819} cells for 1 round, allowing the target to deal additional shock damage. To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which are removed afterwards.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn otorga {g|f:4644d27aca624059883392696c49456d}golpes electrizados{/g} a sí mismo o a un aliado en un radio de {uip|AbilityRange|bbd46bb4c64e4d6aa6783fd1fb6bc819} casillas durante 1 asalto, lo que permite al objetivo realizar daño de conmoción adicional. Para usar esta capacidad, Eogunn debe tener al menos 2 acumulaciones de {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}energía potencial{/g}, que se eliminan tras su uso.

languages.text: Eogunn gewährt sich selbst oder einen Verbündeten in einem Radius von {uip|AbilityRange|bbd46bb4c64e4d6aa6783fd1fb6bc819} Feldern 1 Runde lang {g|f:4644d27aca624059883392696c49456d}Elektrisierte Schläge{/g}. Das Ziel verursacht dadurch höheren Schockschaden. Für den Einsatz dieser Fähigkeit braucht Eogunn mindestens 2 Stapel {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potenzialenergie{/g}, die anschließend entfernt wird.
languages.original_text: Eogunn grants {g|f:4644d27aca624059883392696c49456d}electrified strikes{/g} to himself or an ally within {uip|AbilityRange|bbd46bb4c64e4d6aa6783fd1fb6bc819} cells for 1 round, allowing the target to deal additional shock damage. To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which are removed afterwards.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn gewährt sich selbst oder einen Verbündeten in einem Radius von {uip|AbilityRange|bbd46bb4c64e4d6aa6783fd1fb6bc819} Feldern 1 Runde lang {g|f:4644d27aca624059883392696c49456d}Elektrisierte Schläge{/g}. Das Ziel verursacht dadurch höheren Schockschaden. Für den Einsatz dieser Fähigkeit braucht Eogunn mindestens 2 Stapel {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potenzialenergie{/g}, die anschließend entfernt wird.

languages.text: Eogunn confère {g|f:4644d27aca624059883392696c49456d}Frappes électrifiées{/g} à lui-même ou à un allié dans un rayon de {uip|AbilityRange|bbd46bb4c64e4d6aa6783fd1fb6bc819} cases pendant 1 round, ce qui permet à la cible d'infliger des dégâts d'électrocution bonus. Pour utiliser cette capacité, Eogunn doit disposer d'au moins 2 cumuls d'{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Énergie potentielle{/g}, qui seront consommés.
languages.original_text: Eogunn grants {g|f:4644d27aca624059883392696c49456d}electrified strikes{/g} to himself or an ally within {uip|AbilityRange|bbd46bb4c64e4d6aa6783fd1fb6bc819} cells for 1 round, allowing the target to deal additional shock damage. To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which are removed afterwards.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn confère {g|f:4644d27aca624059883392696c49456d}Frappes électrifiées{/g} à lui-même ou à un allié dans un rayon de {uip|AbilityRange|bbd46bb4c64e4d6aa6783fd1fb6bc819} cases pendant 1 round, ce qui permet à la cible d'infliger des dégâts d'électrocution bonus. Pour utiliser cette capacité, Eogunn doit disposer d'au moins 2 cumuls d'{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Énergie potentielle{/g}, qui seront consommés.

languages.text: Eogunn, kendisine veya {uip|AbilityRange|bbd46bb4c64e4d6aa6783fd1fb6bc819} hücrelik yarıçap içinde bulunan bir dost birime {g|f:4644d27aca624059883392696c49456d}elektrikli ataklar{/g} kabiliyetini kazandırarak hedefin ilave şok hasarı vermesini sağlar. Etki 1 raunt sürer. Eogunn'un bu kabiliyeti kullanabilmesi için en az 2 {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potansiyel enerji{/g} birikimi olması gerekir ve kullanım sonrası bu potansiyel enerji ortadan kalkar.
languages.original_text: Eogunn grants {g|f:4644d27aca624059883392696c49456d}electrified strikes{/g} to himself or an ally within {uip|AbilityRange|bbd46bb4c64e4d6aa6783fd1fb6bc819} cells for 1 round, allowing the target to deal additional shock damage. To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which are removed afterwards.

traits.locale_text:
Eogunn, kendisine veya {uip|AbilityRange|bbd46bb4c64e4d6aa6783fd1fb6bc819} hücrelik yarıçap içinde bulunan bir dost birime {g|f:4644d27aca624059883392696c49456d}elektrikli ataklar{/g} kabiliyetini kazandırarak hedefin ilave şok hasarı vermesini sağlar. Etki 1 raunt sürer.
<i>Eogunn'un bu kabiliyeti kullanabilmesi için en az 2 {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potansiyel enerji{/g} birikimi olması gerekir ve kullanım sonrası bu potansiyel enerji ortadan kalkar.<i>

languages.text: 伊奥贡对自己或{uip|AbilityRange|bbd46bb4c64e4d6aa6783fd1fb6bc819}格内的一名盟友施加{g|f:4644d27aca624059883392696c49456d}带电打击{/g}，持续1轮，使目标造成额外电击伤害。 伊奥贡至少拥有2层{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}势能{/g}，才能使用此能力，使用后消耗2层。
languages.original_text: Eogunn grants {g|f:4644d27aca624059883392696c49456d}electrified strikes{/g} to himself or an ally within {uip|AbilityRange|bbd46bb4c64e4d6aa6783fd1fb6bc819} cells for 1 round, allowing the target to deal additional shock damage. To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which are removed afterwards.

traits.locale_text: 伊奥贡对自己或{uip|AbilityRange|bbd46bb4c64e4d6aa6783fd1fb6bc819}格内的一名盟友施加{g|f:4644d27aca624059883392696c49456d}带电打击{/g}，持续1轮，使目标造成额外电击伤害。 伊奥贡至少拥有2层{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}势能{/g}，才能使用此能力，使用后消耗2层。

languages.text: エオガンは1ラウンドの間、自身または{uip|AbilityRange|bbd46bb4c64e4d6aa6783fd1fb6bc819}マス以内の味方に{g|f:4644d27aca624059883392696c49456d}帯電打撃{/g}を付与し、対象が追加のショックダメージを与えられるようにする。 このアビリティを使用するには、エオガンが少なくとも2スタックの{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}位置エネルギー{/g}を持っている必要があり、使用後に除去される。
languages.original_text: Eogunn grants {g|f:4644d27aca624059883392696c49456d}electrified strikes{/g} to himself or an ally within {uip|AbilityRange|bbd46bb4c64e4d6aa6783fd1fb6bc819} cells for 1 round, allowing the target to deal additional shock damage. To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which are removed afterwards.

traits.locale_text: エオガンは1ラウンドの間、自身または{uip|AbilityRange|bbd46bb4c64e4d6aa6783fd1fb6bc819}マス以内の味方に{g|f:4644d27aca624059883392696c49456d}帯電打撃{/g}を付与し、対象が追加のショックダメージを与えられるようにする。 このアビリティを使用するには、エオガンが少なくとも2スタックの{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}位置エネルギー{/g}を持っている必要があり、使用後に除去される。
